footer.cta_description: Access free psychological guides from the Emotional Library.

community.label: Community
community.title: Intimate Community
community.tagline: A safe space to share, learn and grow together

topics.label: What You Will Understand
topics.subtext: Each theme is a different angle to understand the same core: you in relation to others.
topics.t1_desc: Why you cling to certain people and push others away. The patterns rooted in childhood.
topics.t2_desc: What truly creates attraction beyond physical appearance. The invisible triggers.
topics.t3_desc: How to express what you feel without appearing needy or distant.
topics.t4_desc: Understanding the deep fear that sabotages relationships before they even begin.
topics.t5_desc: Recognizing toxic patterns and building healthy emotional boundaries.
topics.t6_desc: Not as a mantra. A daily practice that transforms how you relate to others.

solution.label: The Approach
solution.desc: Not generic self-help. A deep understanding system of human behavior in relationships, grounded in real psychology, neuroscience and years of observation.
solution.p1_desc: Not surface-level tips. The real mechanisms governing attraction, attachment and human behavior.
solution.p2_desc: Learn to read emotions, yours and others, with precision and without judgment.
solution.p3_desc: Pattern change, not superficial behavior change. Understand why you do what you do.

products.label: Products
products.desc: Deep materials for those who want real results, not shallow content.

cta.label: Start Now
cta.desc: Explore the free psychological guides library created for those who truly want to understand the invisible patterns shaping their relationships.

about.label: About the Platform
about.desc: A platform focused on relationship psychology, emotional intelligence, attraction and human behavior, for those who want to understand love with genuine depth.
about.pillar1_desc: Content grounded in attachment theory, emotional neuroscience and behavioral psychology. Nothing superficial.
about.pillar2_desc: Real tools to recognize patterns, regulate emotions and make better decisions in love.
about.pillar3_desc: Understand the invisible mechanisms governing attraction, connection and distance between people.
about.pillar4_desc: Real pattern change. From the root, not superficial behavior.
about.problem1: Intelligent people making terrible decisions in love
about.problem2: Relationships that start with intensity and end in confusion
about.problem3: The inability to communicate what one truly feels
about.problem4: The cycle of attracting people who don't value you back
about.problem5: Emotional loneliness even while in a relationship
about.value1_desc: We will never simplify what is complex for convenience. Emotional reality deserves intellectual respect.
about.value2_desc: Complex concepts explained with precision and accessibility. No jargon, no sensationalism.
about.value3_desc: We recognize that making mistakes in relationships is not weakness. It is human. And it is the starting point for awareness.
about.value4_desc: Knowledge that does not translate into real change is useless. Every piece of content has a practical purpose.
about.origin_p1: There is a modern paradox: we have never had access to so much content about relationships, and we have never been so lost in them. Tips, techniques and lists of "what to do" multiply, yet emotional confusion persists.
about.origin_p2: Fator Íntimo was born from the realization that the problem is not lack of information. It is lack of real understanding, understanding of the mechanisms that govern attraction, attachment, distancing and connection, and how these mechanisms operate within each person.
about.origin_p3: The platform was created to fill this gap: not with more generic advice, but with applied, honest and accessible psychology, for those who take emotional life seriously.
about.mission_heading: Help people understand love with depth and build more conscious relationships.
about.mission_desc: We believe emotional awareness is not a luxury, it is a human necessity. Our mission is to democratize access to real, applied psychology, making it accessible to anyone willing to look inward with honesty.
about.vision_heading: To be the reference in relationship psychology content.
about.vision_desc: Not as another tips channel, but as a platform that genuinely elevates the conversation about love, attraction and human behavior, rigorous enough to be trusted, accessible enough to transform.
about.founder_quote: "I created Fator Íntimo because I believe that understanding our emotions is the most courageous, and most transformative, act a human being can do."
about.cta_desc: Explore the free guides library. Start with what resonates with what you're living.
